data.content: Plan: 1) locate settings dispatch pools UI and data model for configured agents per step; 2) add swap controls with two pulldowns (current pool agent on left, all available agents on right) plus Swap button; 3) implement pool config mutation that replaces selected existing agent with selected replacement while preserving ordering and preventing invalid no-op swap; 4) wire action to persistence/update path and refresh UI state; 5) add/adjust tests for swap behavior and UI interactions; 6) run quality gates (lint, typecheck, test, build). Risks: source-of-truth for available agents may differ by screen context; mitigate by deriving option lists from existing registry hooks/selectors and validating disabled/error states.
